fault_hypothesis: On line 68, the average is computed by dividing `total` by `window` instead of by `len(tail)`. When the series has fewer elements than the window, this produces an incorrectly low result.

constraints.intent: The computed average must equal total divided by the actual number of samples, not by window.
After computing avg, verify it is consistent with total divided by actual sample count.
Before returning avg, confirm it equals total/len(tail) not total/window.
The tail can have at most window elements; when shorter, dividing by window gives a wrong (smaller) result.
